VIBE #A855F7
MELODY #FB923C

VIBE #A855F7

FIRE & ELECTRIC

Red / Cyan / Gold

BEAT #F12C18
VIBE #00D4FF
MELODY #FFD700

High contrast, EDM festival vibe. Warm beats, cool vibes, golden melodies.

NEON STUDIO

BEAT #FF3366
VIBE #7C3AED
MELODY #F97316

Synthwave/retrowave aesthetic. All warm tones, feels like a neon-lit studio.

DARK PRODUCER

Red / Purple / Amber

BEAT #EF4444
VIBE #8B5CF6
MELODY #F59E0B

Moody, professional. Classic DAW colors - red for drums, amber for leads.

Streaming platform aesthetic. Spotify green for beats, vibrant and modern.
